# Paulo Victor Silva

> Senior Tech Lead - Data Engineering

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
- **Open to:** Remote roles (US/Global)
- **Email:** paulovictordasilvarp@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://psilva.io
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/paulovi

## Professional Summary

Data Engineer and Architect with 10+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable data solutions across retail, hospitality, healthcare, automotive, and fast food industries. Currently leading data engineering at Data Meaning (5+ years), with deep expertise in Snowflake architecture, performance tuning, and cost optimization (SnowPro Core Certified), dbt modular and incremental modeling, and AWS cloud infrastructure (S3, Lambda, Glue, Kinesis). Proven track record leading cross-functional teams, driving technical roadmaps, and mentoring engineers.

## Target Roles

1. **Senior Data Engineer** - Large-scale pipeline design, Snowflake/dbt optimization, cloud infrastructure
2. **Staff Data Engineer** - Technical leadership, architecture decisions, cross-team data strategy
3. **Data Engineering Manager** - Team leadership, roadmap ownership, engineering culture
4. **Data Architect** - End-to-end data platform design, governance, and modeling standards

## Core Competencies

- **Snowflake Architecture & Cost Optimization:** SnowPro Core Certified, performance tuning, warehouse sizing, query optimization
- **dbt Modeling:** Modular, incremental, and snapshot modeling; Data Vault 2.0; SCD Type 2
- **AWS Cloud Infrastructure:** S3, Lambda, Glue, Kinesis, EC2, IAM
- **Event-Driven & Telemetry Pipeline Design:** Real-time and near-real-time data ingestion and processing
- **Azure & Multi-Cloud:** Azure Data Factory, ADLS Gen2, GCP
- **Orchestration:** Airflow/Astronomer, Fivetran, Talend, SSIS, Pentaho
- **Python / PySpark / SQL / PL-SQL:** ETL/ELT development, data transformation, automation
- **Databricks & Big Data Ecosystem:** Hadoop, Hive, YARN, MapReduce, Apache Spark
- **LLMs & MCP Integration:** LLM deployment (public & private), Model Context Protocol
- **Team Leadership & Mentoring:** Cross-functional team leadership, technical roadmaps, engineer development

## Tech Stack

### Data Warehousing
- Snowflake (SnowPro Core Certified), Databricks, DuckDB, SQLite, MS SQL Server, Oracle

### Transformation
- dbt, PySpark, Polars, SQL, Python, PL/SQL

### Cloud & Infrastructure
- AWS (S3, Lambda, Kinesis, Glue, EC2, IAM)
- Azure (ADF, ADLS Gen2)
- GCP

### Big Data
- Hadoop, Hive, YARN, MapReduce, Apache Spark

### Orchestration
- Airflow/Astronomer, Azure Data Factory, Fivetran, Talend, SSIS, Pentaho

### Visualization
- Streamlit, Plotly, Tableau

### AI/LLMs
- LLM deployment (public & private), MCP (Model Context Protocol)

### Languages
- Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Scala

## Work Experience

### Associate Senior Data Engineer - Data Meaning (Fort Lauderdale, FL, Remote) | Sep 2020 - Present (5+ years)

- Snowflake ownership: architecture, performance tuning, cost optimization across multiple client environments
- dbt modular modeling: incremental models, snapshot strategies, Data Vault 2.0 / SCD Type 2 patterns
- AWS cloud pipelines: S3, Lambda, Glue, Kinesis for scalable data ingestion and processing
- Event-driven & telemetry pipeline design: real-time data flows for operational and analytical use cases
- Orchestration & CI/CD: Airflow/Astronomer, automated testing, deployment pipelines
- LLM & MCP integration: deploying language models and Model Context Protocol for data workflows
- Team leadership: mentoring engineers, driving technical roadmaps, cross-functional collaboration
- Analytics & visualization: Streamlit dashboards, Plotly, Tableau reporting layers

### Solutions Architect - Keyrus (Ribeirao Preto, Brazil) | Sep 2019 - Sep 2020

- End-to-end data architecture design for enterprise clients
- Pre-sales and delivery: technical discovery, solution scoping, client presentations
- Cross-functional alignment between business stakeholders and engineering teams

### Data Engineer - Keyrus (Ribeirao Preto, Brazil) | Jun 2018 - Sep 2019

- ETL/ELT pipeline development and optimization
- Data warehouse modeling and implementation
- BI layers and reporting infrastructure

### DBA / SysOps - Bluestorm Software (Ribeirao Preto, Brazil) | Jul 2017 - Jun 2018

- Database administration and system operations

### Oracle Database Specialist - Alcis (Ribeirao Preto, Brazil) | May 2015 - Jul 2017

- Oracle database design, optimization, and administration

### IT Support Analyst - Secretaria da Educacao do Estado de Sao Paulo | Sep 2014 - Jun 2015

- IT infrastructure support and troubleshooting

## Education

- **MBA - Information, Technology and Innovation** | UFSCar (Universidade Federal de Sao Carlos)
- **Bachelor of Information Systems** | UNIESP

## Certifications

- **SnowPro Core Certification** - Snowflake
- **Introduction to Big Data** - Coursera / UC San Diego
- **Big Data Modeling and Management Systems** - Coursera / UC San Diego
- **Founder Institute Graduate** - 2019 Cohort

## Key Projects & Achievements

### Snowflake Data Platform (Data Meaning)
End-to-end ownership of Snowflake environments across multiple client engagements. Architecture design, performance tuning, cost optimization, and governance. SnowPro Core Certified.

### dbt Modular Data Models
Designed and implemented modular dbt projects with incremental models, snapshot strategies, and Data Vault 2.0 patterns. Standardized modeling practices across teams.

### Event-Driven Telemetry Pipelines
Built real-time and near-real-time data pipelines using AWS (Kinesis, Lambda, S3, Glue) for operational telemetry and analytics across retail and fast food clients.

### LLM & MCP Integration
Deployed language models (public and private) integrated with data workflows via Model Context Protocol for intelligent data processing and automation.

### Cross-Industry Data Solutions
Delivered scalable data architectures across retail, hospitality, healthcare, automotive, and fast food industries, adapting patterns to each domain's requirements.

## What I'm Looking For

Senior remote role to:
- Lead data engineering teams and drive technical strategy
- Design and optimize large-scale data platforms (Snowflake, dbt, AWS)
- Mentor engineers and build strong engineering culture
- Deliver measurable business impact through data solutions
